payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark glossy wooden cabinet top with a rounded beveled front edge; surface displays reflective sheen and minor scuffs, with a terracotta pot and scattered papers sitting on it — appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m).

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark glossy cabinet top edge","long_description":"Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark glossy wooden cabinet top with a rounded beveled front edge; surface displays reflective sheen and minor scuffs, with a terracotta pot and scattered papers sitting on it — appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m).","attributes":["dark glossy wood","rounded beveled front edge","edge-cropped / partial","reflective sheen","minor scuffs/scratches","objects on top (pot, papers)","close proximity (~0.6 m)"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
